title: Bestway Spaceship Above Ground Pool
features: SPACESHIP SHIP POOL: Comes in a truly unique design, shaped like a silver flying saucer! It's designed to resemble a futuristic spacecraft, combining the fun of a swimming pool with the excitement of space exploration!
DURABLE MATERIAL: The kids' paddling pool is made from a 3-ring construction and sturdy, pre-tested vinyl for long-term use, ensuring your kids can create endless summer memories!
EASY SETUP: The kids' paddling pool can be set up and stored in no time! Simply release the pool water with the easy-to-use drain valve

BUILT-IN SUPPORT: The pool is designed in a round shape to encourage your kids to take their first steps in swimming lessons. By creating a safe space, it will help build your kids' confidence in the water
COMPLETE SET: Includes 1 pool and a repair patch for longer-lasting use. Water capacity is 512L, and the product dimensions are 1.52m x 43cm
description: From the manufacturer Easy Set Up Simply inflate and fill with water, when ready release pool water with the built-in drain valve; size 1.57m x 41cm Space Ship Style The Spaceship Pool comes in a truly unique design in the shape of a silver flying saucer! Durable Made from Sturdy pre-tested vinyl with safety valves with repair patch for longer lasting use
